changelog: Emergency fix: rolled back the bundled-asset speed-up that shipped in v1.43.86. That build crashed for some users on launch. Mandatory update so anyone stuck on v1.43.86 gets pulled out of the crash automatically.

All other recent improvements remain — magnify and glow effects gone, screensaver fix, cross-device sync, the layout modal that kept popping up. We'll re-enable the bundled-asset speed-up safely in a follow-up build.
